MMM.rationale: MMM's +74.6% one-year rally has pushed valuation to extreme levels (P/B 15.4x, P/S 2.5x) while trailing fundamentals remain deeply negative (net margin -22.9%, ROE -142%, FY23 EPS -$12.63), creating an unfavorable risk/reward despite positive sentiment.
